metadata.file_name: Billy Joel - Tell Her About It.flac
metadata.title: Tell Her About It
metadata.lyrics:
[00:04.40] Whooo-hooo-hooo
[00:05.39] Whoo-hoo-hoo-hoo
[00:10.93] Listen boy
[00:12.00] I don't want to see you let a good thing
[00:14.16] Slip away (Slip away)
[00:15.89] You know I don't like watching
[00:17.47] Anybody make the same mistakes I made
[00:20.99] She's a real nice girl
[00:22.34] And she's always there for you
[00:26.30] But a nice girl wouldn't tell you
[00:28.61] What you should do
[00:31.69] Oh, listen boy
[00:33.01] I'm sure that you think you got it all under control
[00:36.92] You don't want somebody telling you
[00:39.50] The way to stay in someone's soul
[00:42.13] You're a big boy now
[00:43.55] And you'll never let her go
[00:45.90] (You'll never, never let her go)
[00:47.42] But that's just the kind of thing
[00:49.42] She ought to know
[00:53.15] Tell her about it
[00:55.32] Tell her everything you feel
[00:58.56] Give her every reason to accept
[01:01.40] That you're for real
[01:03.79] Tell her about it
[01:05.95] Tell her all your crazy dreams
[01:09.08] Let her know you need her
[01:11.09] Let her know how much she means
[01:15.45] Whooo-hooo-hooo
[01:20.74] Whoo-hoo-hoo-hoo
[01:24.84] Listen boy
[01:25.84] It's not automatically a certain guarantee
[01:29.04] (Certain guarantee)
[01:29.78] To insure yourself
[01:31.14] You've got to provide communication constantly
[01:35.01] When you love someone
[01:36.67] You're always insecure
[01:40.32] And there's only one good way to reassure
[01:45.92] Tell her about it
[01:48.24] Let her know how much you care
[01:51.36] When she can't be with you
[01:53.17] Tell her you wish you were there
[01:56.49] Tell her about it
[01:58.68] Every day before you leave
[02:01.72] Pay her some attention
[02:03.62] Give her something to believe
[02:07.48] 'Cause now and then
[02:08.79] She'll get to worrying
[02:11.50] Just because you haven't spoken for so long
[02:18.10] And though you may not have done anything
[02:22.36] Will that be a consolation when she's gone?
[02:28.13] Listen boy
[02:29.16] It's good information from a man
[02:31.02] Who's made mistakes
[02:32.95] Just a word or two that she gets from you
[02:35.55] Could be the difference that it makes
[02:38.18] She's a trusting soul
[02:39.77] She's put her trust in you
[02:41.76] (You know she's put her trust in you)
[02:43.47] But a girl like that won't tell you
[02:45.66] What you should do
[02:49.02] Tell her about it
[02:51.11] Tell her everything you feel
[02:54.35] Give her every reason
[02:56.24] To accept that you're for real
[02:59.58] Tell her about it
[03:01.65] Tell her all your crazy dreams
[03:04.79] Let her know you need her
[03:06.62] Let her know how much she means
[03:09.98] Tell her about it
[03:12.53] Tell her how you feel right now (Tell her about it)
[03:14.78] Just tell her about it (Tell her about it)
[03:17.75] The girl don't want to wait too long (Tell her about it)
[03:20.03] You got to tell her about it (Tell her about it)
[03:23.07] Tell her now and you won't go wrong (Tell her about it)
[03:25.27] You got to tell her about it (Tell her about it)
[03:27.95] Before it gets too late (Tell her about it)
[03:30.06] You got to tell her about it (Tell her about it)
[03:33.06] You know the girl don't want to wait (Tell her about it)
[03:38.25] You got to tell her about it
[03:40.63]
